session_note: S51 — autonomous batch run approved by user. Standard-tier batch (2 priorities): P1 E2E spawner-rate test-override seam (+ Sym D / Sym I downstream fixes uncovered after spawner unblock) + P2 audio polish (OGG/Opus re-encode, PannerNode positional audio, music auto-duck). Council R1 deliberated (Battle Ledger 6 rows + 3 Δ rows). PRIME-AUDIT pass complete. User explicit go upfront for autonomous overnight execution.
council_battle_ledger: 6 rows + 3 Δ. C1 ADOPT A (rate=1.5) over Grok B (0.5 fails math — at λ=0.5 first wait is 7.69s, leaves Sym A with only 1 spark in 10s window). C2 ADOPT A per-Sym addInitScript (unanimous, mirrors PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE precedent). C3 ADOPT A optional pos? arg (unanimous, no regression). C4 ADOPT A drainAudioEffects event-coupling (unanimous, avoids state-coupling risks of CREATURE_TICK gate). C5 ADOPT A keep MP3 fallback over Gemini B (Safari pre-17 fallback cheap). C6 ADOPT B no LFS (unanimous, 3.5 MB OGG fine direct in git). Δ1 (Gemini) __TEST_RNG_SEED__ DEFERRED to S52 backlog. Δ2 (Gemini) duckMusic max-end-time semantics REFINEMENT ADOPTED — implemented as nextDuckEndCtxTime pure helper. Δ3 (Claude) audioManager.test.ts pre-flight confirmed pure-helper-only — no AudioContext mocking required for new tests.
prime_audit: 5 deltas surfaced + handled in-flight. (1) Module-eval timing of test seams — confirmed addInitScript fires BEFORE bundled scripts so constants.ts captures override at module-init, mirror of S50 P4 PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE precedent verified empirically by Sym A/C passing immediately after seam landed. (2) Determinism risk of changing seed-dependent spawner timing — production rate untouched, override is window-only, replay-determinism preserved. (3) FREE_SPARK_SOFT_CAP=50 vs λ=1.5 steady-state — ~33s to reach cap, all e2e tests place within first 30s, no despawn pressure. (4) Sym D init-script function-form vs string-content — first attempt with TS arrow function failed (transient flake or TS-compiled-arrow capture issue); switched to {content: 'window....=0'} string form, test passes consistently across 2 confirming runs. (5) Sym I anchor positions (800,400)/(800,600) were INSIDE spawner zone (dist 213 < SPAWNER_RADIUS=250) — moved to (300,400)/(300,600)/(300,800) outside zone, real test design bug fixed.

priorities.label: S51 P0 — State discovery + Council R1 + PRIME-AUDIT
priorities.check_method: Phase A.0 empirical state-discovery: gh run view 26440547587 (5 E2E failures, all sparks-spawned timeout pattern), Read e2e/smoke.spec.ts + helpers.ts (test contract understood), Read main.ts + physicsLoop.ts + net/session.ts + net/hostHandlers.ts + net/clientHandlers.ts (P2 refactor verified correct — extractions mechanical, no functional change), Read constants.ts (SPAWN_RATE_PER_SECOND=0.15 confirmed), Read LOCKED_DECISIONS.md line 155+167 (0.15 is intentional S5 amendment — CANNOT change production), simulated spawner via node -e (mulberry32(0xc0ffee).first()=0.0214 → 25.71s first wait at λ=0.15 → 1 spawn in 30s; deterministic. Math: P(0 sparks at tick=1604 | λ=0.15) ≈ 1.8% × 5 tests × 3 retries → P(all 15 zero) ≈ 10⁻²⁶, systematic not statistical). Audio inventory: public/audio/blue-steppe-orbit.mp3 = 10.0 MB. Audio code: audioManager.ts (515 LOC) + audioCursor.ts (57 LOC). ffmpeg 8.1 + libopus confirmed. Council R1 via parallel Grok + Gemini calls — Battle Ledger 6 rows + 3 Δ rows.

priorities.label: S51 P1 — E2E spawner-rate test-override + Sym D/I downstream fixes
priorities.check_method: Three coordinated fixes for the 5 failing e2e tests (S50 P5 EOS-audit unmasked from continue-on-error + y=676 button-coord bug). (1) src/constants.ts: SPAWN_RATE_PER_SECOND test-override seam mirror of PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE — window.__TEST_SPAWN_RATE_PER_SECOND__ read at module-init, production 0.15 unchanged per LOCKED_DECISIONS Item 3 (S5 strategic-bet feel amendment). (2) e2e/smoke.spec.ts: applyTestSpawnRate helper applied per-Sym to A/C/D/F/I (rate=1.5 per Council C1 — at λ=1.5 first spawn at 2.56s vs 25.71s at 0.15, same seed sequence preserved). (3) Sym D — __TEST_TERRITORY_BASE_RADIUS__=0 seam (Sym F territory radius ≥72 > AUTO_BOND_RADIUS=60 means cross-color bond test contract unreachable post-S49 P1; disable territory only in Sym D to test the color-seg invariant which is now defense-in-depth — used {content: 'window...=0'} string form after TS-arrow form intermittent issue). (4) Sym I — moved anchor X from 800 to 300 (800,400) and (800,600) were INSIDE SPAWNER_RADIUS=250 zone (dist 213px from center), causing silent rejection — (300,400)/(300,600)/(300,800) are 675+ px out, well outside zone. Council Battle Ledger C1-C2 + PRIME-AUDIT Δ4-Δ5 ADOPTED. Verification: npx tsc -b --noEmit clean. npm test 783 → 796 GREEN (+13 panner/duck tests). npx playwright test 6/6 GREEN locally (1 skipped Sym E fixme) in 1.3 min. Bundle 496.28 → 497.67 KB (within 500 KB charter, 2.33 KB headroom). e2e CI re-run pending push.

priorities.label: S51 P2 — Audio polish (OGG/Opus + PannerNode + auto-duck)
priorities.check_method: S18 P9 carry-forward shipped via 3 sub-tasks per Council Battle Ledger C3-C5: (a) ffmpeg -c:a libopus -b:a 64k -application audio re-encode blue-steppe-orbit.mp3 (10.0 MB) → blue-steppe-orbit.ogg (3.5 MB — 65% size reduction; Council C5 ADOPT A keep MP3 on disk as Safari pre-17 fallback). Updated MUSIC_URL in audioManager.ts to /audio/blue-steppe-orbit.ogg. Note: PDR target was ~2 MB but 64k Opus is near-transparent for instrumental music vs 48k (~2.3 MB but audible quality loss); user can swap rate downward if mobile-cold-load priority outweighs quality. (b) Optional pos?:Vec2 arg added to playClaveSFX/playFartSFX/playChargeSFX/playOneShot. mapPanningPosition pure helper exported (canvas top-down → X=stereo, Z=front-back, Y=0). createPanner internal helper inserts PannerNode (equalpower model, refDistance=1, maxDistance=2, rolloffFactor=1) between osc/source gain and shared sfxGainNode. Listener implicit at origin. Wired into drainAudioEffects on BOND_FORMED/BOND_SEVERED/CREATURE_CHARGE — passes effect.pos. (c) duckMusic(durationMs, depth=0.25) — cancelScheduledValues + setTargetAtTime ramp down 30ms → hold → setTargetAtTime ramp up 150ms after duration. PRIME-AUDIT Δ2 REFINEMENT (Gemini): nextDuckEndCtxTime pure helper (exported for tests) implements max(currentEnd, candidate) semantics so a 300ms CREATURE_CHARGE duck mid-flight through a 700ms BOND_SEVERED-creature duck never truncates the longer one. Wired into drainAudioEffects: CREATURE_CHARGE → 300ms duck, BOND_SEVERED cause='creature' → 700ms duck. Verification: 13 new unit tests added (7 mapPanningPosition + 6 nextDuckEndCtxTime). npm test 796/796 GREEN. tsc -b --noEmit clean. vite build success, bundle 497.67 KB (+1.39 KB vs S50 close, within 500 KB charter, 2.33 KB headroom).
